sentences.arabic: اِجْتَمَعَ زُعَمَاءُ الْعَالَمِ فِي مَدِينَةِ دُبَي لِمُنَاقَشَةِ تَغَيُّرِ الْمُنَاخِ.
sentences.translation: Svjetski lideri sastali su se u Dubaiju kako bi razgovarali o klimatskim promjenama.
sentences.translationEn: World leaders met in Dubai to discuss climate change.

sentences.arabic: هَدَفَ الِاجْتِمَاعُ إِلَى تَقْلِيلِ الِانْبِعَاثَاتِ الضَّارَّةِ بِالْبِيئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sastanak je imao za cilj smanjenje štetnih emisija po okoliš.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting aimed to reduce harmful environmental emissions.

sentences.arabic: أَكَّدَ الْمُشَارِكُونَ عَلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ الطَّاقَةِ الْمُتَجَدِّدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učesnici su naglasili važnost obnovljive energije.
sentences.translationEn: Participants emphasized the importance of renewable energy.

sentences.arabic: يُرِيدُ الْجَمِيعُ حِمَايَةَ كَوْكَبِ الْأَرْضِ مِنَ الِاحْتِبَاسِ الْحَرَارِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Svi žele zaštititi planetu Zemlju od globalnog zagrijavanja.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone wants to protect planet Earth from global warming.

sentences.arabic: تَعَهَّدَتِ الدُّوَلُ بِتَقْدِيمِ الدَّعْمِ لِلْمَشَارِيعِ الْخَضْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Države su se obavezale pružiti podršku zelenim projektima.
sentences.translationEn: Countries pledged to provide support for green projects.
